fields.name: navItems
fields.label: Navigation Links
fields.instruction: Add 2 to 5 links. Use #section-id to scroll to a section on your page.

fields.name: href
fields.label: Where it goes
fields.instruction: Use #services, #testimonials, #contact to scroll — or paste a full URL

fields.name: ctaButton
fields.label: Top Right Button
fields.instruction: This button appears on the top right — usually used to book a call or contact you

fields.name: href
fields.label: Where it goes
fields.instruction: Link to Calendly, WhatsApp, or your contact section using #contact

sections.label: Hero Section
sections.instruction: This is the first thing visitors see — make it count

fields.name: fullName
fields.label: Full Name
fields.instruction: Your name — will be used across the portfolio

fields.name: availabilityText
fields.label: Availability Badge
fields.instruction: Short text shown in a badge at the top of your hero

fields.name: headline
fields.label: Main Headline
fields.instruction: Your strongest value proposition — what you do and for whom
fields.placeholder: I design and build websites that win clients

fields.name: subtext
fields.label: Supporting Text
fields.instruction: A short paragraph expanding on your headline
fields.placeholder: I help startups and small businesses create a strong online presence through clean design and fast development...

fields.name: ctaButtons
fields.label: Call to Action Buttons
fields.instruction: Add up to 2 buttons — e.g. See My Work, Contact Me

fields.name: href
fields.label: Where it goes
fields.instruction: Use #services, #contact to scroll — or paste a full URL

sections.label: Stats
sections.instruction: Show numbers that build trust — e.g. projects completed, years of experience. Optional — skip if you are just starting out.

sections.label: Clients
sections.instruction: Type a client or platform name and press Enter — e.g. Fiverr, Upwork, Local Business. Skip if you have no clients yet.

sections.label: Services
sections.instruction: List the services you offer. Add at least 2.

fields.name: icon
fields.label: Icon
fields.instruction: Add a single emoji to represent this service

fields.name: description
fields.label: Service Description
fields.instruction: Briefly describe what this service includes
fields.placeholder: Clean, modern and user-friendly interface design for web and mobile apps...

sections.label: Testimonials
sections.instruction: Add reviews from past clients. At least 1. These build trust with new visitors.

fields.name: quote
fields.label: What they said
fields.placeholder: John delivered exactly what we needed, on time and with great attention to detail...

sections.label: Contact
sections.instruction: How potential clients can reach out to you. Navbar #contact link will scroll here.

fields.name: subtext
fields.label: Supporting Text
fields.placeholder: Have a project in mind? I would love to hear about it. Send me a message and I will get back to you within 24 hours.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Your Email Address
fields.instruction: Visitors will be able to email you directly by clicking the contact button

sections.label: Direct Contact Links
sections.instruction: Add any direct contact options — WhatsApp, Telegram, Fiverr, Upwork etc.

fields.name: href
fields.label: Phone Number or Profile Link
fields.instruction: Add a clickable link — e.g. https://wa.me/923001234567 for WhatsApp
